tools: Everything about tattoo equipment and tools
working hours: Working hours: from 9:00 to 20:00 Kyiv time

about_info.1: Welcome to Tattoo Mall—our tattoo shop where industry enthusiasts, professional artists, and beginners taking their first steps in tattoo art come together. We understand how crucial it is to carefully and precisely select tools for productive tattoo sessions, and we help you quickly find exactly what will make them just that.
about_info.2: Our assortment is more than just tattoo equipment—it’s an entire team of knowledgeable and truly effective assistants on your workstation. After undergoing long development stages and countless tests under the close supervision of domestic engineers, cosmetologists, and globally recognized brands, these products have gained experience and improved every day. Now, they are ready to show what they are capable of and help you unlock your full potential.

page not found: This page is not found, we are already working to restore it!

urgent delivery.title: Urgent delivery
urgent delivery.info: Your purchases will be packed and shipped on the day the order is placed. As soon as the order is confirmed by a call from the manager, our staff will immediately pack and ship your order. Take advantage of this service — it will save you one day of waiting. This service is especially relevant if the order is placed closer to the weekend.

postal guarantee.title: Postal guarantee
postal guarantee.info: Additional protection for your shipment against accidental damage and spoilage during delivery. If anything happens to your purchases during transit—such as damage, breakage, or spillage—we will fully compensate you for the loss. The postal guarantee ensures your order will be delivered safely and intact.

extended Warranty.title: Extended Warranty
extended Warranty.info: Protect your purchases from loss and damage! By choosing the extended postal warranty, we will reimburse you for the full cost of the purchased item in case of total loss of the package or damage to the item during transportation by Russian Post or a shipping company. Additionally, you receive our 2-year warranty on all items in your order.

gift wrapping.title: Gift wrapping
gift wrapping.info: The best solution for a gift. We will beautifully wrap your order, and the delivery will be carried out by a courier company to you or another recipient, at your discretion. The details of the delivery will be confirmed during the call from the manager to confirm your order.

contact our support: Contact our support if you have any questions about your order, or if you're unable to assemble and set up your tattoo equipment. We are here to help.
info about order processing time: Your orders, calls, and inquiries are processed during business hours. If you contact us outside of these hours, we will get back to you the next day. We take your time zone into account and will not call you at an inconvenient time.
pickup point info: Pickup point in Kyiv, Khreshchatyk St, 22. Delivery cost: 110 UAN. If the order is placed before 15:00, delivery is on the same day.
machines not found: Tattoo machines not found. Try later or choose another category

about_page.hero_subtitle: Official brands. Expert advice. Fast delivery across Ukraine.
about_page.value_1_desc: Only original products from verified distributors — no counterfeits or grey-market schemes
about_page.value_2_desc: Nova Poshta to any city. Orders placed before 15:00 are shipped the same day
about_page.value_3_desc: A team of practicing tattoo artists to help you choose the right tool for your style and level
about_page.value_4_desc: 14-day exchange or return policy. Manufacturer warranty on all equipment
about_page.cta_title: Ready to place your first order?
about_page.cta_text: Browse our catalog or reach out to our manager — we will help you find exactly what you need.

help_page.cat_delivery_text: We ship via Nova Poshta anywhere in Ukraine. Learn about timelines and costs.
help_page.cat_payment_text: Card online, cash on delivery, or cash — choose the most convenient method.
help_page.cat_return_text: 14-day return policy for undamaged goods. Exchange in case of defect.
help_page.cat_warranty_text: Manufacturer warranty on all equipment. Extended options available at checkout.
help_page.cat_guide_text: Detailed reviews and tips from practicing tattoo artists in our blog.
help_page.cat_order_text: Add items to cart, choose delivery and payment — then wait for your package.
help_page.faq_d1_a: Nova Poshta delivery is charged at carrier rates, typically 80–110 UAH. Pickup from our Kyiv location is free.
help_page.faq_d2_q: How do I track my order?
help_page.faq_d2_a: After shipping you will receive a tracking number via email or phone. Track your parcel on the Nova Poshta website.
help_page.faq_d3_a: Yes! Our pickup point is located at 22 Khreshchatyk St, Kyiv. Working hours: Mon–Fri, 9:00–20:00.
help_page.faq_p1_a: We accept card payments via WayForPay, cash on delivery, and cash at pickup.
help_page.faq_p2_a: This option is not yet available, but we are actively working on it. Stay tuned!
help_page.faq_p3_a: You pay for the item upon receiving it at the Nova Poshta branch. Convenient and secure.
help_page.faq_w1_q: Is there a warranty on tattoo machines?
help_page.faq_w1_a: Yes, all equipment comes with a manufacturer warranty. The duration depends on the brand and is listed on the product page.
help_page.faq_w2_q: How do I return an item?
help_page.faq_w2_a: Contact our manager within 14 days of receiving the item. It must be in original packaging with no signs of use.
help_page.faq_w3_a: Absolutely! We work exclusively with official distributors and brand suppliers.
help_page.faq_o1_q: How do I cancel an order?
help_page.faq_o1_a: Contact our manager as soon as possible after placing the order. Cancellation is possible before the item ships.
help_page.faq_o2_q: Where can I find my orders?
help_page.faq_o2_a: All your orders are available in your personal account.
help_page.support_desc: Our team is ready to answer any question. Choose a convenient way to contact us.
